meta.title: Deep research program
meta.purpose: Doctoral-grade agenda: questions, methods, data gaps, and deliverables. No claims without sources.

streams.title: Comparative value chains: Lommel ↔ Lake Victoria silica
streams.summary: Test whether Uganda can replicate integrated extraction–processing–manufacturing without repeating Flanders' early environmental damage.
research_questions: What purity, grain-size, and wash-plant specifications does container vs. float glass require at each Ugandan locality (Diimu, Bukakata, Kome)?
What is the current cost structure of imported glass vs. a domestic plant at Lake Victoria logistics distances?
Which Lommel-era policy instruments (zoning, export levies on raw sand, cluster parks) are transferable under the Mining and Minerals Act, 2022?
methods: Systematic literature review (DGSM, BGS/NORA, peer-reviewed geochemistry)
Comparative case study (Lommel/Kristalpark, Mol/Dessel FPV, Masaka/Diimu project archives)
Stakeholder interviews (DGSM, NEMA, local government, artisanal miners) — fieldwork required
required_primary_data: Uganda import statistics for glass and containers (UBOS / trade codes HS 7010–7019)
Feasibility/EIA documents for stalled Diimu glass projects

streams.title: Lacustrine extraction & concurrent reclamation
streams.summary: Lake Victoria shores are ecologically unlike closed Campine quarries; reclamation models must be lake-specific.
research_questions: How do artisanal and industrial sand lifts affect nearshore bathymetry, papyrus wetlands, and Nile perch spawning grounds?
Can concurrent reclamation bonds be calibrated using restoration costs from comparable African Great Lakes cases?
What post-mining uses (wetland restoration, regulated aquaculture, eco-tourism) are ecologically defensible per site?
methods: Legal analysis of progressive rehabilitation clauses in Act 2022
required_primary_data: NEMA EIA registers for Masaka/Mukono/Buvuma sand operations
Lake Victoria Fisheries Organisation catch statistics by landing site

streams.title: Renewable energy co-location with industry
streams.summary: Separate Belgian precedents: ground-mounted industrial PV (Kristal) vs. quarry-lake FPV (Mol/Dessel).
research_questions: For Uganda's equatorial climate, what is the modelled ΔT_cell and LCOE difference between land PV, rooftop PV, and FPV on closed pits vs. open lake bodies?
Can glass furnaces and sand washing plants be feasibly supplied from dedicated renewable PPAs under current UETCL tariff rules?
Under which conditions does FPV on Lake Victoria fail ecological screening (fisheries, water quality)?
methods: Techno-economic modelling (PVSyst or SAM) with local irradiance data
Thermodynamic review using temperature coefficient literature (IRENA)
Multi-criteria decision analysis (energy yield vs. ecological risk)
required_primary_data: NASA POWER or Global Solar Atlas hourly data for target districts
Industrial load profiles for hypothetical glass plant
deliverables: Methods paper section on FPV suitability criteria

streams.title: Beyond silica: balanced development minerals portfolio
streams.summary: Less commercialized regions can prioritize limestone, clay, dimension stone, and salt with formalization—not only glass sand.
research_questions: Which development minerals offer the highest local employment per unit environmental disturbance?
How do DELVE-documented artisanal sites overlap with protected wetlands or forest reserves?
What small-scale technologies raise value addition without megaproject capital?
methods: Spatial overlay with protected area GIS (WCMC/UGA shapefiles)

streams.title: Circular glass and import substitution
streams.summary: European cullet integration reduces melting energy; Uganda lacks formal collection systems—design question, not assumption.
research_questions: What share of packaging glass is imported vs. domestically produced today (trade data)?
What collection logistics work in Kampala/Jinja informal economies?
What energy and CO₂ reductions are realistic at X% cullet inclusion?
methods: Life-cycle assessment (cradle-to-gate) once plant parameters exist
required_primary_data: Furnace technology choice for hypothetical plant

can_do_now: Expand bibliography with DOI/URL verification and BibTeX export
Add research-stream pages, comparative tables, and annotated literature notes in the repo
Structure catalog entries for additional DGSM-documented minerals (gold, copper, tin, REE where cited)
Draft literature-review prose with inline source_ids (you verify before thesis submission)
Build static visualizations from CSV/JSON you provide (production, assays, trade)
Fact-check draft chapters against fact-checks.json and flag unsupported claims
Prepare Netlify previews for each research branch via GitHub PRs
needs_human_or_institution: New geochemical assays, EIAs, bathymetry, or shoreline GPS surveys
Interviews with DGSM, NEMA, district officials, miners (ethics approval)
Official import/export datasets not published online
Legally binding policy commitments or bond calculations signed by government
cannot_ethically_do: Invent reserve tonnages, purity percentages, or economic projections without a cited document
Present news articles as peer-reviewed evidence
Recommend specific concession boundaries without spatial data and community consent processes
